Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Navigators (The Elder Empire: Sea)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Navigators use Elderspawn guides to cross the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The three Navigators run for the shore.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Navigators are the only ones who can safely cross the Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Navigators supervise the Aion.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Navigators are part of the Imperialist alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — The Navigators is a group one can join for excitement and adventure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Navigators are recalling to the Capital and stocking up on supplies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Navigators are a group capable of following ships into the deep Aion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Calder was banished to the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — Navigators were searching for a vanishing ship.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Navigators are a group that does exactly what the Sleepless and Blackwatch do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Navigators are a group that will compete to speak for their Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Regent hired the Navigators to transport the crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Navigators are led by Cheska Bennett.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Ordinary ships in the vision began to look like those of the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Navigators can catch people on the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Navigators are organized into a Guild.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
